title: Dynatrace Notebook
description: Schema for Dynatrace Notebook JSON structure. Notebooks contain sections of markdown, DQL queries, Davis AI interactions, and JavaScript/TypeScript functions.

version.description: Schema version. Current version is '5'. Notebooks are migrated forward through versions 0→1→2→3→4→5.

defaultTimeframe.description: Default timeframe for all sections in the notebook. Sections can override this with their own timeframe.

sections.description: Array of notebook sections. Can be empty. Sections are displayed in order.

Timeframe.description: Relative or absolute timeframe specification using Dynatrace timeframe syntax.

Section.description: A notebook section. Use 'type' field to discriminate between section types.

DrilldownPathDescriptor.description: Describes one step in a drilldown navigation path.

identifier.description: Identifier for this drilldown step (e.g., entity ID, field value).

MarkdownSection.description: Section containing markdown or HTML content for documentation and formatting.

id.description: Unique identifier for the section. Usually a UUID.

markdown.description: Markdown or HTML content to display. Supports standard markdown syntax and some HTML tags.

DqlSection.description: Section executing a DQL (Dynatrace Query Language) query with visualization.

id.description: Unique identifier for the section. Usually a UUID.

title.description: Section title text. If empty or absent, title is not shown.

showTitle.description: DEPRECATED: Whether to show the title. Use truthy 'title' field instead.

state.description: Complete workflow state including input, execution result, visualization settings, and query settings.

height.description: Section height in pixels. Common values: 200, 400 (default), 600, 800.

showInput.description: Whether to show the input editor (query or function code). Default: true.

drilldownPath.description: Navigation path for drilldown interactions. Each element represents a drilldown step.

queryConfig.description: Query configuration from dql-builder. Contains structured query representation for UI-based query building. Complex object with datatype discriminator (metrics vs logs).

previousQueryConfig.description: Previous query configuration state for undo/comparison purposes.

DavisCopilotSection.description: DQL section enhanced with Davis AI copilot for natural language query generation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the section. Usually a UUID.

subType.description: Sub-type discriminator indicating this is a Davis Copilot-enhanced DQL section.

title.description: Section title text. If empty or absent, title is not shown.

showTitle.description: DEPRECATED: Whether to show the title. Use truthy 'title' field instead.

state.description: Complete workflow state including input, execution result, visualization settings, and query settings.

height.description: Section height in pixels. Common values: 200, 400 (default), 600, 800.

showInput.description: Whether to show the input editor (query or function code). Default: true.

drilldownPath.description: Navigation path for drilldown interactions. Each element represents a drilldown step.

davisCopilot.description: Davis AI copilot state and configuration.

prompt.description: Natural language prompt provided by the user to generate the DQL query.

response.description: Response from Davis AI including generated query and status.

showDqlSnippet.description: Whether to show the generated DQL code snippet in the UI.

feedbackProvided.description: Whether the user has provided feedback on the AI-generated query.

DavisCopilotResponse.description: Response from Davis AI copilot. Discriminated union based on status field.

status.description: No request has been made yet.

data.description: Response data from Davis AI including the generated DQL query and the original prompt.

prompt.description: The prompt used to generate this query (saved with response for feedback matching).

FunctionSection.description: Section executing JavaScript/TypeScript function code with visualization of results.

id.description: Unique identifier for the section. Usually a UUID.

title.description: Section title text. If empty or absent, title is not shown.

showTitle.description: DEPRECATED: Whether to show the title. Use truthy 'title' field instead.

state.description: Complete workflow state including input, execution result, visualization settings, and query settings.

height.description: Section height in pixels. Common values: 200, 400 (default), 600, 800.

showInput.description: Whether to show the input editor (query or function code). Default: true.

drilldownPath.description: Navigation path for drilldown interactions. Each element represents a drilldown step.

foldings.description: Array of line numbers where code folding is applied in the editor.

AnalyticsWorkflowState.description: Complete state of an analytics workflow including input, execution result, visualization, and settings. From @dynatrace/data-exploration package.

input.description: Input for the workflow: DQL query string or function code, and optional timeframe override.

result.description: Execution result including status code, output data, errors, and execution metadata.

visualization.description: Selected visualization type for displaying results.

visualizationSettings.description: Settings specific to the selected visualization (chart colors, table columns, etc.).

querySettings.description: Query execution settings like result limits and sampling ratio.

Input.description: Input for a workflow: query/function code and timeframe.

value.description: DQL query string or JavaScript/TypeScript function code.

timeframe.description: Timeframe for this specific section (overrides notebook defaultTimeframe).

AnalyticsWorkflowResultState.description: Result of workflow execution including status, data, errors, and metadata.

input.description: The input that produced this result (for correlation and caching).

dateTime.description: Timestamp of execution in ISO 8601 format.

value.description: Result data. Structure depends on query type and result format. Can be array of records, structured response, or raw value.

notifications.description: Warnings, info messages, or errors from execution.

querySettings.description: Query settings that were applied during execution.

Notification.description: A notification message with severity level.

Visualization.description: Type of visualization for displaying query/function results.

VisualizationSettings.description: Settings for various visualization types. Only relevant settings are populated based on selected visualization.

chartSettings.description: Settings for chart visualizations (line, area, bar, etc.). Includes axis configuration, series overrides, field mappings.

table.description: Table-specific settings like column widths, sorting, hidden columns, row density.

hiddenColumns.description: Array of column ID arrays to hide from table.

lineWrapIds.description: Array of column ID arrays with line wrapping enabled.

firstVisibleRowIndex.description: Index of first visible row (for scroll position persistence).

singleValue.description: Single value visualization settings including label, sparkline, trend, alignment.

recordField.description: Field name to display as single value.

unitsOverrides.description: Unit display overrides for numeric fields.

thresholds.description: Threshold rules for coloring data based on values.

QuerySettings.description: Execution settings for queries including result limits and sampling.

maxResultRecords.description: Maximum number of result records to return.

defaultScanLimitGbytes.description: Maximum amount of data to scan in gigabytes.

defaultSamplingRatio.description: Sampling ratio for log queries. Higher = faster but less accurate.

enableSampling.description: Whether to apply sampling to log queries.
